servinfo.title: Fuel Leakage Check Procedure
servinfo.ptxt: After performing any service on fuel system, check that there are no fuel leaks as follows.

s1.ptxt: Set ignition ON for 3 seconds (to operate fuel pump) and then to OFF. Repeat this cycle of operation 3 or 4 times.
Fuel pressure should now be established in fuel system and felt by hand on fuel feed hose.
Check that there are no fuel leaks from any part of fuel system.
